title: wdio-mocha-framework@0.3.9 untested ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [wdio-mocha-framework](https://www.npmjs.com/package/wdio-mocha-framework) just published its new version 0.3.9.
State No tests :warning:
Dependency wdio-mocha-framework
New version 0.3.9
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range**, but I **could not detect automated tests** for this project. Without a test suite I **can not really tell whether your project still works**. I was looking at the latest commit of your default branch, but GitHub said there is no status attached to it. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 5 commits . - [`6380f81`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/6380f81fc509a6628e249b5279c6b3b341ee0dcf) v0.3.9 - [`328bbdf`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/328bbdf67525dfdee40f183a757795eef3a16251) bumped wdio-sync - [`9badcd8`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/9badcd8b8ac65b46ebd6802812e67fe92d5c39e5) v0.3.8 - [`d49c31d`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/d49c31dd5d4c43c0a4919b6fab9df92602e600a3) bumped wdio-sync package - [`2e5e764`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/2e5e7642f41c5cdcdf73c1a42c0f1ce1e35b44be) make sure user hooks don't interfer with test process - closes webdriverio/webdriverio1460 See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/compare/d6c20ad075a4545cee923e7308efd6416231d459...6380f81fc509a6628e249b5279c6b3b341ee0dcf). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
